def negative_llm_response_not_cached_same_input():
    rule_id = "llm_response_not_cached_same_input"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Repeated LLM calls show no visible caching even when prompt inputs appear likely to repeat."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
